title: Hoya inflata
taxonomy: Hoya inflata is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a type of waxy-leaved climber native to Southeast Asia. The classification of Hoya inflata places it within the genus Hoya, which comprises over 500 species of plants. Hoya inflata is further classified within the Apocynaceae family, which includes approximately 5,000 plant species. This classification indicates the plant's relationships with other organisms and its evolutionary history.
